global.title: Dark Theme Base Palette
global.content: Achra and Vetra share an identical dark theme base palette defined under .dark and [data-theme="dark"] selectors. Surface colors: --background: #1B1E24, --foreground: #FCFCFC, --foreground-70: rgba(252, 252, 252, 0.5), --foreground-50: rgba(252, 252, 252, 0.3). Card colors: --card: #252A34, --card-foreground: #F3F5F7, --card-foreground-50: rgba(243, 245, 247, 0.5). Secondary: --secondary: #4F596F, --secondary-foreground: #A6B1C7. Muted: --muted: #343839, --muted-foreground: #6C7275. Border and input: --border: #485265, --input: #1B1E24, --ring: #F3F5F7. Popover: --popover: #1E222B, --popover-foreground: #FCFCFC. Accent: --accent: #373E4D, --accent-foreground: #F3F5F7. The Powerhouse parent brand uses a darker dark theme (--background: #0E0E0D, --card: #1A1D22, --accent: #2A2D33, --border: #3A3F47) matching its powerhouse.io site. Source: colors.css files at https://github.com/powerhouse-inc/design-systems.
global.description: Shared dark theme surface colors across Achra and Vetra: background #1B1E24, foreground #FCFCFC, card #252A34, border #485265.
